title: Maxwell Totem of undying
description: Adds an animated texture of a spinning cat to the totem's place, and adds music when it is used.
body:
Adds an animated texture of a spinning cat to the totem's place, and adds music when it is used.

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17242f30c16990231a1f55b4168a9a00295237c4.gif)
